hero.heading: Dubai real estate is about to
hero.description: A new platform built around verified agents, real demand, and private opportunities.
hero.notEveryoneAccess: Not everyone will get the same access.
hero.earlyRegistrationDesc: We're opening early registration to a select group of agents and brokerages before official launch.

footer.description: A verification-first property platform for the UAE. Launching in Dubai with verified agents, real listings, and genuine intent.

agents.heading: No more cold
agents.subheading: Built for Agents Who Want Real Deal Flow.
agents.desc1: Deal 360 connects agents with live buyer and tenant requirements aligned to their expertise and inventory.
agents.desc2: Designed for commission-based professionals who want structure, speed, and serious engagement.
agents.leadFlow0Desc: Engage with buyers and tenants who have clearly defined what they need, aligned to your areas and inventory.
agents.leadFlow1Desc: Engage with owners planning to sell or rent by securing interest before properties formally go live.
agents.leadFlow2Desc: No bulk exposure game. Clear visibility on demand, activity, and engagement.
agents.leadFlow3Desc: Receive notifications when new buyer and tenant requirements enter the system.
agents.leadFlow4Desc: Structured lead management, pipeline control, and performance visibility.
agents.whyDifferent1: No paying just to be seen.
agents.whyDifferent2: No competing for cold, duplicated enquiries.
agents.whyDifferent3: Deal 360 aligns expertise with genuine demand.
agents.privateOpportunities: Private & off-market opportunities, some inventory will never be public.

brokerage.heading: Run your brokerage, not just ads.
brokerage.desc1: Deal 360 is built for brokerages that want structured visibility, performance oversight, and operational control.
brokerage.desc2: Manage agents, inventory, and performance within one connected platform designed for leadership, not micromanagement.
brokerage.desc3: Brokerage-Level Control, built for teams, not just individual agents.
brokerage.capability0Desc: Track, organize, and oversee agents with role-based permissions.
brokerage.capability1Desc: Clear signals on response time, activity, and transaction performance.
brokerage.capability2Desc: Maintain quality and compliance across inventory at scale.
brokerage.capability3Desc: Connect with structured buyer, tenant, and owner intent.
brokerage.earlyBrokerageDesc1: Founding brokerages will help shape platform standards ahead of full rollout.
brokerage.earlyBrokerageDesc2: Preferential early-access terms secured before wider release.

incentives.heading: Rewards for early
incentives.desc1: Build your profile. Upload verified inventory. Invite quality professionals. Be part of the verified foundation of Deal 360.
incentives.desc2: To support a strong, credible launch, Deal 360 rewards agents and brokerages who help build high-quality, verified inventory.
incentives.earlyInventoryDesc: Agents and brokerages who complete their setup and upload verified listings will receive complimentary Deal 360 credits.
incentives.earlyHowItWorks3: Property must pass Verified Deal verification
incentives.earlyRewards0: 1 complimentary credit per Verified Deal approved listing
incentives.earlyRewards1: Subject to a minimum cap per account
incentives.earlyRewards2: Credits are issued once qualification requirements are met
incentives.earlyRewards3: Credits are non-transferable and cannot be exchanged for cash
incentives.earlyFootnote: This ensures our launch inventory is verified and ready for real demand from day one.
incentives.referralDesc: Help us grow a high-quality, verified network and get rewarded. If you refer another agent or brokerage and they activate a paid plan, you will receive a discount on your next billing cycle.
incentives.howItWorksReferral: How It Works — a referral is successful when:
incentives.referralReqs3: The account remains active beyond the minimum billing period
incentives.referralRewards0: Refer 1 successful paid account — 50% off your next billing cycle
incentives.referralRewards1: Refer 2 successful paid accounts — 100% off your next billing cycle
incentives.termsDesc: Referral rewards apply to the referrer's active paid plan only. A maximum of one 100% discounted billing cycle may be applied per cycle, and discounts cannot be stacked beyond one full month. Self-referrals or referrals between related accounts are not permitted. Rewards are non-transferable, not redeemable for cash, and may be withheld in cases of misuse or abuse of the referral program. These early adopter rewards are available for a limited period as part of our launch phase.
incentives.freeAccountsNote: Free, inactive, duplicate, refunded, or unverified accounts do not qualify.

intent.heading: Start with Requirements. Not Endless Searching.
intent.desc1: Buyers and tenants define exactly what they're looking for through structured requirements, supported by precision filters designed to reduce noise and surface aligned availability.
intent.desc2: Deal 360 connects real intent with real supply, not guesswork.
intent.intentPoint1: Use precision filters to narrow aligned availability

joindeal.heading: Join Deal 360 early.
joindeal.desc1: Agents and brokerages secure early-registration rates. Buyers, owners, and investors get priority onboarding at launch.
joindeal.desc2: Deal 360 is not a lead portal. It is a transparent property platform built around verified listings, real intent, and better decision-making.
joindeal.highlight0Desc: No payment is taken upfront during registration. Billing begins only once the platform is live and the account is activated on a paid plan.
joindeal.highlight1Desc: Early registration availability is limited and subject to verification. We are onboarding a select group of verified professionals first.
joindeal.highlight2Desc: Your feedback directly influences features and improvements. Early access to platform features as they are released.
joindeal.earlyAccessDesc: Early registration allows agents and brokerages to join Deal 360 ahead of public release and secure preferential rates, valid for 12 months from activation.
joindeal.earlyAccess1: Early setup of profiles, teams, and inventory before full platform rollout.
joindeal.earlyAccess2: Priority access to new features ahead of wider release.
joindeal.earlyAccess3: Preferential pricing secured ahead of full platform release.
joindeal.whyMattersDesc: Not everyone will get the same access. Establishing your presence early means better positioning when the platform goes public.
joindeal.whyMatters0: Help shape a platform built for UAE property

pricing.heading: Plans built for UAE property professionals.

portal.heading: Clearer intent. Better property decisions.
portal.desc: Deal 360 isn't another property portal. It's a verification-first platform that connects you with verified agents, real listings, and genuine intent—so you can make smarter property decisions in the UAE.

notAPortal.heading: Not another property portal.
notAPortal.desc: Deal 360 is a property operating platform built around transparency, verification, and intent, designed for professionals and serious users.

ownersControl.heading: Sell or Rent with Control.
ownersControl.desc: Owners declare Listing Intent before going live and connect with agents aligned to genuine demand, without broadcasting their property everywhere.
ownersControl.controlPoint3: Built for serious sellers and landlords

propertyManager.heading: Property Manager
propertyManager.desc: Track rental income, tenancy dates, and overall portfolio performance in one structured dashboard, built for landlords and investors managing multiple properties.
propertyManager.managerPoint0: Track rental income across multiple properties
propertyManager.managerPoint1: Monitor tenancy start, expiry, and renewal dates
propertyManager.managerPoint2: View portfolio performance in one place
propertyManager.managerPoint3: Stay organized across units, tenants, and agents
propertyManager.footerDesc: Built for investors who want clarity, not spreadsheets.

smarterFilters.heading: Better filters. Less friction.
smarterFilters.desc: Results are refined using intent, availability, and verification, reducing irrelevant listings and helping users reach decisions faster.

subHero.heading: A better way to navigate property in the UAE.
subHero.desc: We help buyers, sellers, agents, brokerages, and investors make clearer property decisions by aligning real demand with verified supply launching in Dubai and expanding across the UAE.

verification.heading: Verification filters out the noise.
verification.desc: Every agent on Deal 360 is verified. Every listing is checked. No more fake listings, no more unresponsive agents. Just genuine opportunities with verified professionals.

whatsComing.heading: More than a portal. Here's why.
whatsComing.card4Desc: Some inventory will never be public.
whatsComing.card3Desc: Built for teams, not just individuals.

listingForm.subtitleSale: Share your property details to connect with verified agents who may already have qualified buyers or can help source the right match.
listingForm.subtitleRent: Share your property details to connect with verified agents who may already have suitable tenants or can help source the right match.
listingForm.idealForInfoModal: Ideal For indicates whether the property is best suited for personal use, investment purposes, or both.
listingForm.securityDepositTooltip: What security deposit will be required from the tenant?
listingForm.utilitiesQuestion: Are utilities included in the rent?
listingForm.utilitiesNotIncluded: Not included — tenant registers and pays utilities directly (most common)
listingForm.utilitiesAllIncluded: All utilities included in rent (common for short-term rentals)
listingForm.datePickerInfoText: If available from a particular month, select the 1st of that month (e.g. available from May → 1 May)
listingForm.bedroomsInfoModal: Bedrooms do not include maid's room or Studies
listingForm.bathroomsInfoModal: Total number of bathrooms, including powder room and cloakrooms.
listingForm.parkingSpacesInfoModal: Number of allocated parking spaces included with the property.
listingForm.featureMaidsRoomInfoText: Separate room intended for live-in staff. Not counted as a bedroom.
listingForm.featureStudyInfoText: Separate room used as a home office or study. Not counted as a bedroom.
listingForm.featureVastuInfoText: Indicates that the seller or agent considers the property to be Vastu compliant. Buyers are advised to verify this independently.
listingForm.chequeTermsLabel: Annual Rent Payment Terms (Number of Cheques)
listingForm.chequeTermsTooltip: In Dubai, long-term rental contracts are typically paid through post-dated cheques issued for the full annual rent. The number of cheques determines how the yearly rent is split across the tenancy period.
listingForm.chequeTermsHelperText: Some landlords adjust rent depending on the number of cheques. If left blank, the base rent will apply to all payment terms.
listingForm.viewingOptionsTooltip: Photos, floor plans or videos help agents understand the property and identify suitable buyers or tenants. Media can be updated later and agents can coordinate viewings once the listing is active.
listingForm.financeInfoModal: Payment plan terms are set by the developer and may vary by project. Buyers should confirm all schedules and timelines with the agent and developer.
listingForm.keyMoneyInfoModal: A one-time goodwill payment sometimes requested for commercial spaces that are fully or partially fitted and ready to operate, such as with existing fit-out, fixtures, or furniture.
listingForm.leaseHelperText: Most rental contracts in Dubai are 12 months and registered with Ejari
listingForm.datePickerInfoText: If available from a particular month, select the 1st of that month (e.g. available from May → 1 May)
listingForm.privateListingInfoModal:
Keep this property off public search results.

If enabled, your property will not appear in public property searches and will only be visible to a limited group of verified agents and qualified investors within the Deal 360 platform.

This option is often used for discreet sales, high-value properties, or situations where owners prefer controlled exposure.

Because the listing is not publicly visible, this may reduce the number of enquiries but may result in more targeted interest. Private listings are often managed by a small number of selected agents to maintain discretion and focus.

You may switch your listing to public visibility at any time.
listingForm.referredByEmailPlaceholder: Email of the person who referred you (optional)
listingForm.listingIntentNoticeText: A property can only be marketed under a limited number of valid DLD listing permits. You may appoint up to a maximum of three agents, each holding a valid permit. Appointing one agent (exclusive) is often preferred by agents, as it avoids duplicate listings, improves accountability, and allows stronger commitment to marketing and negotiations.
listingForm.agentsCountLabel: How many agents will represent this property?
listingForm.sellerCommissionStanceDesc: Are you offering a seller-paid commission or a fixed fee? (Visible to agents)
listingForm.sellerCommissionYes: Yes - Happy to pay a seller commission or a fixed fee
listingForm.sellerCommissionNo: No - agent will need to be covered by buyer commission only
listingForm.commissionNoticeSale: As a seller, you may choose to offer a seller-paid commission or a fixed fee to support the sale. While optional, this can attract more buyers, encourage stronger agent engagement and prioritisation. All commission or fee arrangements are discussed and agreed directly between the parties before proceeding Please note that some brokerages may have internal policies that prioritise listings offering a seller-paid commission or fee.
listingForm.agentEngagementDesc: Please indicate how you would like agents to engage with your listing request:
listingForm.agentEngagementWithBuyers: Agents who already have suitable buyers / tenants
listingForm.agentEngagementWithBuyersDesc: Agents may contact you if they currently have qualified buyers or tenants who may be interested in your property.
listingForm.agentEngagementOpenSource: Open to agents who can source buyers / tenants
listingForm.agentEngagementOpenSourceDesc: Agents may also propose marketing strategies or offer to source suitable buyers or tenants through their network and market expertise.
listingForm.agentEngagementNote: Your preference helps agents respond in a way that aligns with your expectations.
listingForm.agentResponseDesc: To help manage the number of responses you receive, please indicate how many agents you would like to hear from:
listingForm.agentResponseAll: Open to responses from all suitable agents
listingForm.agentResponseAllDesc: Your listing request may be shared with multiple agents who may contact you or submit proposals.
listingForm.agentResponseLimit: Limit responses to a select number of agents
listingForm.agentResponseNote: Limiting responses may reduce the number of proposals you receive but may result in more focused engagement.
listingForm.contactConsentDesc:
By submitting this request, you consent to your property details being shared with relevant agents on the Deal 360 platform so they can review your listing and respond with proposals, marketing strategies, or assistance in sourcing suitable buyers or tenants.

Some agents may already have potential buyers or tenants available, while others may offer to market your property and source opportunities through their network or market expertise.
listingForm.preferredContactMethodLabel: Preferred Contact Method (Select all that apply)
listingForm.remainAnonymousDesc:
If selected, your name and contact details will remain hidden from agents during the proposal stage. Agents may still review your listing and submit proposals, but they will not know your identity or be able to contact you directly.

Your contact details will only be shared with the agent(s) you choose to engage with.

Selecting this option may reduce the number of responses you receive, as some agents may prefer to engage with clients directly.
listingForm.platformDisclaimerText:
Deal 360 is an independent property platform that connects users with licensed real estate professionals. Agents and brokerages using the platform operate independently and do not represent or work directly for Deal 360.

Any proposals, marketing strategies, or services offered are provided solely by the individual agent or brokerage. Deal 360 does not control or guarantee the performance, availability of buyers or tenants, or outcomes of any transaction.

Users are encouraged to review agent responses carefully and choose the professional they wish to engage with.
listingForm.consentSharingLabel: I consent to my property details being shared with agents on the Deal 360 platform in order to receive proposals, marketing strategies, or assistance in sourcing suitable buyers or tenants.
listingForm.errorNetwork: Unable to submit. Please check your connection and try again.
listingForm.successMessage: Your listing intent has been recorded. We'll be in touch once we launch.
listingForm.featuresCommercialPlaceholder: e.g. fully fitted, raised flooring, server room
listingForm.amenitiesCommercialPlaceholder: e.g. central AC, dedicated parking, 24hr security

requirementForm.subtitleBuyer: Post your requirements to receive matched deals from verified agents
requirementForm.subtitleTenant: Post your requirements to receive matched deals from verified agents
requirementForm.useTypeInfoModal: Use Type defines how the property is legally or functionally designated (e.g., residential, commercial, mixed-use).
requirementForm.bedroomsInfoModal: Bedrooms do not include maid's room or Studies
requirementForm.bathroomsInfoModal: Total number of bathrooms, including powder room and cloakrooms.
requirementForm.mustHaveFeaturesPlaceholder: e.g. fitted kitchen, raised floor, private entrance
requirementForm.featureMaidsRoomInfoText: Separate room intended for live-in staff. Not counted as a bedroom.
requirementForm.featureStudyInfoText: Separate room used as a home office or study. Not counted as a bedroom.
requirementForm.featureVastuInfoText: Indicates that the seller or agent considers the property to be Vastu compliant. Buyers are advised to verify this independently.
requirementForm.amenitiesTextPlaceholder: e.g. reception area, server room, loading bay
requirementForm.viewingOptionsTooltip: Photos, floor plans or videos help agents understand the property and identify suitable buyers or tenants. Media can be updated later and agents can coordinate viewings once the listing is active.
requirementForm.financeInfoModal: Payment plan terms are set by the developer and may vary by project. Buyers should confirm all schedules and timelines with the agent and developer.
requirementForm.keyMoneyInfoModal: A one-time goodwill payment sometimes requested for commercial spaces that are fully or partially fitted and ready to operate, such as with existing fit-out, fixtures, or furniture.
requirementForm.leaseHelperText: Most rental contracts in Dubai are 12 months and registered with Ejari
requirementForm.datePickerInfoText: If available from a particular month, select the 1st of that month (e.g. available from May → 1 May)
requirementForm.referredByEmailPlaceholder: Email of the person who referred you (optional)
requirementForm.commissionNoticeBuyer: Buyer's commission and government fees are typically paid by the buyer. All commission and fee details are discussed and agreed directly with the agent handling the transaction.
requirementForm.commissionNoticeTenant: Tenant commission and related fees are typically paid by the tenant. All commission and fee details are discussed and agreed directly with the agent handling the rental transaction.
requirementForm.errorNetwork: Unable to submit. Please check your connection and try again.
requirementForm.successMessage: You're on the list! We'll be in touch once we launch.
requirementForm.tipForResultsText: If you are considering more than one property option — for example, both an apartment and a villa, or properties in different locations — it is better to submit a separate requirement for each. This helps agents identify the most relevant matches and respond with greater accuracy.
requirementForm.tipForResultsTextCommercial: If you are considering more than one property option or properties in different locations — it is better to submit a separate requirement for each. This helps agents identify the most relevant matches and respond with greater accuracy.
requirementForm.matchPreferenceDesc: Please indicate how strictly you would like agents to match your requirements:
requirementForm.matchExactDesc: Only provide properties that closely match the requirements I have specified.
requirementForm.matchOpenLabel: Open to similar or alternative options
requirementForm.matchOpenDesc: Agents may also suggest properties that are similar to my requirements or offer strong alternatives based on their expertise.
requirementForm.matchPreferenceNote: Your preference helps agents provide more relevant property suggestions.
requirementForm.agentResponseDesc: To help manage the number of responses you receive, please indicate how many agents you would like to hear from:
requirementForm.agentResponseAllLabel: Open to responses from all suitable agents
requirementForm.agentResponseAllDesc: Your request may be shared with multiple agents who may contact you or submit proposals.
requirementForm.agentResponseLimitLabel: Limit responses to a select number of agents
requirementForm.agentResponseNote: Limiting responses may reduce the number of proposals you receive but may result in more focused engagement.
requirementForm.contactConsentText:
By submitting this request, you consent to your property requirements being shared with relevant agents on the Deal 360 platform so they can review your criteria and respond with property suggestions, proposals, or assistance in sourcing suitable options.

Please note that some agents may already have matching properties available, while others may offer to source opportunities that meet your requirements through their network or market expertise.
requirementForm.preferredContactMethodLabel: Preferred Contact Method (Select all that apply)
requirementForm.remainAnonymousDesc:
If selected, your name and contact details will remain hidden from agents during the proposal stage. Agents may still review your requirements and submit property suggestions or proposals, but they will not know your identity or be able to contact you directly.

Your contact details will only be shared with the agent(s) you choose to engage with.

Selecting this option may reduce the number of responses you receive, as some agents may prefer to engage with clients directly.
requirementForm.platformDisclaimerText:
Deal 360 is an independent property platform that connects users with licensed real estate professionals. Agents and brokerages using the platform operate independently and do not represent or work directly for Deal 360.

Any property suggestions, proposals, or services offered are provided solely by the individual agent or brokerage. Deal 360 does not control or guarantee the availability, suitability, or accuracy of properties presented by agents.

Users are encouraged to review agent responses carefully and choose the professional they wish to engage with.
requirementForm.consentLabel: I consent to my property requirements being shared with agents on the Deal 360 platform in order to receive property suggestions, proposals, or assistance in sourcing suitable properties.

everyconnection.heading: Every connection starts with verification.
everyconnection.desc: Agents, brokerages, and listings are verified so users engage with real professionals and real availability — not duplicated or misleading data.

hero.desc2: Designed for commission-based professionals who want structure, speed, and serious engagement.

points.p2: No competing for cold, duplicated enquiries.
points.p4: Deal 360 aligns expertise with genuine demand.

items: Early setup of profiles, teams, and inventory before full platform rollout.

plansbuilt.subtitle: Agents and brokerages may join on Lite (Free) or select a paid plan during early registration. No payment is taken upfront. Rates are fixed for 12 months from activation.

customPlans.title: Custom Plans
customPlans.subtitle: For larger brokerages, multi-office groups, and high-volume teams
customPlans.description: We work closely with select partners to structure tailored packages based on team size, usage, and operational needs. This includes flexible credit allocation, scalable seat distribution, and dedicated onboarding support. Designed for brokerages operating at scale and looking for a more customised setup.

rewards.subtitle: Build your profile. Upload verified inventory. Invite quality professionals. Be part of the verified foundation of Deal360.
rewards.description: To support a strong, credible launch, Deal360 rewards agents and brokerages who help build high-quality, verified inventory.

card1.title: Early Inventory Incentive
card1.description: Agents and brokerages who complete their setup and upload verified listings will receive complimentary Deal360 credits.
card1.footerNote: Verified inventory ready from day one.

card2.title: Referral Program
card2.description: Help us grow a high-quality, verified network — and get rewarded. If you refer another agent or brokerage and they activate a paid plan, you will receive a discount on your next billing cycle.
card2.howItWorks: How It Works — a referral is successful when:
steps: The account remains active beyond the minimum billing period
card2.stepsNote: Free, inactive, duplicate, refunded, or unverified accounts do not qualify.
rewards: Free, inactive, duplicate, refunded, or unverified accounts do not qualify.
Refer 2 successful paid accounts → 100% off your next billing cycle
card2.terms: Referral rewards apply to the referrer's active paid plan only. A maximum of one 100% discounted billing cycle may be applied per cycle, and discounts cannot be stacked beyond one full month. Self-referrals or referrals between related accounts are not permitted. Rewards are non-transferable, not redeemable for cash, and may be withheld in cases of misuse or abuse of the referral program. These early adopter rewards are available for a limited period as part of our launch phase.
